creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Distfiles portsurvey pointed out failure for x11/xcolors.

	Seeing as the program is tiny, trivial, very unlikely to
	ever change in the forseeable future, and historically fun,
	store a copy on my colocated box and make myself mainnon-trivial, and cute in
	a historical kind of way, s

Fix: Seeing as the program is tiny, trivial, very unlikely to
	ever change in the forseeable future, and historically fun,
	store a copy on my colocated box and make myself maintainer.

	Apply following patch.

Version:	1.3 (unchanged)
